featured.title: Customer favorites this week
featured.subtitle: Prices already include basic insurance & unlimited in-city mileage.

how.title: Three steps to your keys
how.subtitle: No drawn-out haggling, no queues. All done from your phone.
how.step1Desc: Set location and dates. We only show cars that are genuinely available.
how.step2Desc: Upload your ID/license, pay securely via QRIS, e-wallet or card. Price locked.
how.step3Desc: Fast handover with a photo checklist. Just drive off.

modes.title: Drive yourself or let us take the wheel
modes.selfDriveDesc: Total freedom to explore at our most affordable rates.
modes.withDriverDesc: Experienced drivers — you just enjoy the ride.

trust.title: Built to be trusted, not just rented
trust.subtitle: Every detail is designed so you feel at ease before, during, and after the trip.
trust.p1Desc: Total, deposit, and add-on fees shown clearly before you pay. No surprises.
trust.p2Desc: Regular service & inspection before every rental. Condition documented in photos.
trust.p3Desc: PCI-DSS certified gateway. Your documents are encrypted per data-protection law.
trust.p4Desc: Our team is on WhatsApp anytime, from booking to return.

testimonials.title: Trips that bring people back
testimonials.t1: Picked up at the airport, car was clean and fresh. The process was so quick — no tedious haggling like other rentals.
testimonials.t2: Used the driver mode to pick up clients. The driver was neat and on time. Invoice landed in my email instantly.
testimonials.t3: The price on screen matched exactly what I paid. Deposit returned in full after inspection. Recommended.

ctaBand.title: Ready to roll? Your car is waiting.
ctaBand.subtitle: Check availability for your dates in 30 seconds. No credit card needed to see prices.

faq.title: Things people often ask
faq.subtitle: Still unanswered? Our team is ready to help on WhatsApp.
faq.q1: What documents are needed for self-drive?
faq.a1: For Indonesians: an active national ID (KTP) and class-A driving license. For foreigners: passport and international license. Documents are verified manually by our team before handover.
faq.a2: The deposit is held at booking and returned in full once the car comes back in checklist condition. The amount varies by category and is shown clearly before you pay.
faq.a3: Yes. Cancellation is free up to 2 days before pickup. After that a tiered fee applies, shown on the checkout page.
faq.q4: What's included in the with-driver mode?
faq.a4: The rate covers driver service up to 12 working hours per day. Fuel, tolls, parking, overtime, and out-of-town lodging are billed separately and explained before payment.
faq.a5: QRIS, e-wallets (GoPay, OVO, Dana), credit/debit cards, and bank virtual accounts. All processed through a certified gateway.
faq.q6: Is insurance included in the price?
faq.a6: Yes, every car includes basic (TLO) insurance. Extra all-risk coverage can be added as an add-on at checkout.

confirm.ns3: Arrive on schedule, show your booking code, drive off.
confirm.needHelp: Need help? Chat with us on WhatsApp.
